meta.title: Lé Vibe — IDE-first repo cleanup backlog + prior shippable milestones
meta.workspace_summary: Dogfood manifest (SESSION_ORCHESTRATION_SPEC). Unified-install + STEP14 epics done (2026-04-14). Active PM tracks: fresh-install Continue stabilization (gray-box + yaml.schemas failure) and IDE-first repository cleanup — see epics in product.epics plus .lvibe/IDE_FIRST_REPO_CLEANUP_BACKLOG.md. E1: 902 passed, 1 skipped when last recorded. .lvibe/ not authoritative vs docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md except where PM updates land in docs tasks.
meta.rag_notes: Authority: docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md (wins vs .lvibe/). STEP 14 verified on-host. E1 902/1 skipped; playbook chain contracts plus test_build_env_lvibe_defaults_step14_contract set -a/set +a guard, exact APP_NAME/ORG_NAME export lines, export-order assertions (set -a < APP < ORG < set +a), exact export-count==2, set +a tail guard, no export BINARY_NAME invariant, and BINARY_NAME stays codium comment anchor. Added test_pm_stage_map_step17_contract AI Pilot observability anchor (near–real time + witness + not a black box).
meta.continue_construction_note: product.epics: pending fresh-install-continue-stabilization and ide-first-repo-cleanup (see .lvibe/IDE_FIRST_REPO_CLEANUP_BACKLOG.md). Strict priority: complete all task-e* in epic-fresh-install-continue-stabilization before starting new task-a*/b*/c*/d* unless operator explicitly overrides for that session.
meta.ai_pilot_note: Same PRODUCT_SPEC §5/§8; doc-first per docs/PM_STAGE_MAP.md. Continue apiBase remains managed Ollama port per le-vibe/templates/continue-config.yaml.j2 and docs/AI_PILOT_AND_CONTINUE.md.

session_steps.title: Describe what you want to build
session_steps.description: Optional; unified-install epic in this manifest is marked done — see product.epics and meta.continue_construction_note.

session_steps.title: Master orchestrator scans project
session_steps.description: Use monorepo tree + this manifest + .lvibe/ for context.

session_steps.title: Load agents and RAG context
session_steps.description: Enable skill agents per manifest; attach manifests and docs pointers.

session_steps.title: Iterate PM epics and tasks
session_steps.description: Walk product.epics in order — all tasks currently done. Add a new epic when docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md prioritization (or PM) defines the next increment.

engineer_completion_protocol: Whenever an engineer agent changes code, it must finish with clean, scoped git commits.
Before task completion, engineer agents must push their branch/commits to the remote and report push status.
If push is blocked (permissions/network/policy), mark task blocked with explicit reason and required operator action.

milestones.objective: Install path delivers Continue + YAML + Lé Vibe continue-config pairing without mandatory manual setup; verifiable in CI/smoke.
acceptance: One automation path installs continue.continue@pin and redhat.vscode-yaml (or pinned YAML) after first-run YAML exists.
sync-continue-config remains idempotent; repair command documented if marketplace fails.
Tests or smoke scripts assert critical invariants where feasible without blocking headless CI.

epics.title: Unified install / setup — Continue + YAML + orchestrator config
epics.description: PM_STAGE_MAP STEP 7 (H4) + STEP 14.h; end-to-end per docs/continue-extension-pin.md and packaging/bin/le-vibe-setup-continue.

tasks.title: Extend setup/install scripts: pin Continue + install redhat.vscode-yaml before/after sync per policy
tasks.notes: Files: packaging/scripts/install-continue-extension.sh, packaging/bin/le-vibe-setup-continue, optionally packaging/continue-openvsx-version companion pin for YAML.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: le-vibe-setup-continue (or successor) installs both extensions; order documented; non-fatal network failure does not break apt.

tasks.title: Integrate automation into default install/first-run (no mandatory manual le-vibe-setup-continue)
tasks.notes: Files: le-vibe/le_vibe/launcher.py (post first-run), packaging/scripts/install-le-vibe-local.sh, debian/le-vibe.postinst messaging.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Fresh install + lvibe <ws> reaches usable Continue without user running separate setup except documented repair.

tasks.title: Tests, smoke, operator docs aligned with new flow
tasks.notes: Files: le-vibe/tests/*continue*, debian/le-vibe.README.Debian, docs/continue-extension-pin.md.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: pytest + contract tests green; README reflects happy path; PM_STAGE_MAP pointers still true.

epics.title: Maintainer — full-product .deb + verify-step14-closeout (PRODUCT_SPEC §7.3 / STEP 14)
epics.description: Requires editor/vscodium/VSCode-linux-* and both .deb artifacts on a build machine — docs/PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md, docs/apt-repo-releases.md, PM_STAGE_MAP STEP 14 row. Not replaceable by .lvibe/ session notes.

tasks.title: Run verify-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb after stack + le-vibe-ide .deb builds (optional --json, --apt-sim)
tasks.notes: 2026-04-14: preflight-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb all OK; verify-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb exit 0 (apt-sim not run). Artifacts: ../le-vibe_0.1.9_all.deb, packaging/le-vibe-ide_0.1.3_amd64.deb, VSCode-linux-x64/bin/codium.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: verify-step14-closeout exits 0 where both .debs exist; optional manual-step14-install-smoke on test host per docs.

tasks.title: Optional test host: sudo apt install both .debs then packaging/scripts/manual-step14-install-smoke.sh --verify-only
tasks.notes: 2026-04-14: manual-step14-install-smoke.sh --verify-only exit 0 (lvibe, /usr/lib/le-vibe/bin/codium, desktop, README.Debian present). Same host as build had packages installed; use a clean VM for release sign-off if policy requires.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Smoke script exits 0 after install; record host OS if policy allows — not required for merge.

epics.title: Fresh install stabilization — Continue gray-box + yaml.schemas registration failure
epics.description: After install-le-vibe-local.sh --install --yes on a clean host, Continue can appear as a gray box and extension host logs show yaml.schemas write failure. Stabilize extension install/activation order and recovery behavior.

tasks.title: E1 — Reproduce on clean install and capture logs/artifacts
tasks.notes: Capture extension list/state, workbench.desktop.main.js errors, and exact install path used.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Deterministic repro documented under .lvibe/audit/ with environment details.

tasks.title: E2 — Enforce YAML extension availability before Continue schema writes
tasks.notes: Touch installer and first-run paths as needed; avoid non-deterministic race/order assumptions.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: No yaml.schemas write attempt occurs before key registration is available.

tasks.title: E3 — Harden Continue activation and fallback/remediation path
tasks.notes: Address gray-box behavior and expose actionable recovery command/log signal.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Fresh install yields usable Continue or explicit guided remediation; no silent gray-box failure.

tasks.title: E4 — Add contract/smoke tests for fresh-install extension activation
tasks.notes: Extend existing continue/yaml tests and install smoke coverage where practical.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Regression path covered by automated test or deterministic smoke script check.

tasks.title: E5 — Update docs with post-install verification and triage SOP
tasks.notes: README.Debian / install docs should include verify + repair flow.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Operator-facing docs contain exact checks and recovery commands.

epics.title: IDE-first repository cleanup — remove r-vibe wrapper mental model; single focus on IDE + Ollama + agent + install
epics.description: Engineering executes .lvibe/IDE_FIRST_REPO_CLEANUP_BACKLOG.md. Authorized: full git toolkit (prefer git mv). Outcome: one coherent product tree and docs; optional physical consolidation per accepted RFC.

tasks.title: A1 — Tree inventory and source-of-truth map (no moves)

tasks.acceptance_criteria: Top-level purposes documented; duplicate packaging paths called out.

tasks.title: A2 — Target layout RFC with options, risks, CI impact, recommendation

tasks.title: A3 — Audit r-vibe / monorepo strings for doc and automation update list

tasks.title: B1 — README and clone dirname / product identity alignment

tasks.acceptance_criteria: Quick-start matches PM naming; no stale cd r-vibe if deprecated.

tasks.title: B2 — PRODUCT_SPEC / PM_STAGE_MAP IDE-first language (minimal edits)

tasks.acceptance_criteria: No contradictory monorepo mandate where PM directs single-product focus.

tasks.title: B3 — Maintainer/developer doc index titles and framing

tasks.acceptance_criteria: Doc graph intact; framing is IDE-product-first.

tasks.notes: Skip with explicit N/A in manifest if RFC keeps dual trees.

tasks.acceptance_criteria: No stale relative paths in scoped areas; CI green.

tasks.title: C3 — Tests and packaging contract updates
tasks.notes: pytest from repo root.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Full test suite green.

tasks.title: C4 — Submodules and editor build docs if paths touched

tasks.title: D1 — Install / STEP14 / smoke per docs (evidence recorded)
